property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.10\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.10\bin;C:\Users\oumai\OneDrive\Desktop\Proservices training\apache-maven-3.9.16-bin\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;C:\Users\oumai\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\oumai\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\oumai\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: Je souhaite tester le bouton logout
testcase.classname: Je souhaite tester les boutons logout et about de l application swaglabs
testcase.system-out: @testcase @logout Scenario: Je souhaite tester le bouton logout # src/spec/features/features_files/logout.feature:9 Given je me connecte sur l application Swaglabs # com.e2etests.automation.step_definitions.AuthenticationStepDefinitions.jeMeConnecteSurLApplicationSwaglabs() When je click sur le menu burger # com.e2etests.automation.step_definitions.LogoutStepDefinitions.jeClickSurLeMenuBurger() And je click sur logout # com.e2etests.automation.step_definitions.LogoutStepDefinitions.jeClickSurLogout() Then je me redirige vers la page de connexion "Swag Labs" # com.e2etests.automation.step_definitions.LogoutStepDefinitions.jeMeRedirigeVersLaPageDeConnexion(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: Jun 21, 2026 11:45:14 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 149, returning the closest version; found: 147; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 149

testcase.name: Je souhaite tester le bouton About
testcase.classname: Je souhaite tester les boutons logout et about de l application swaglabs
testcase.system-out: @testcase @about Scenario: Je souhaite tester le bouton About # src/spec/features/features_files/logout.feature:14 Given je me connecte sur l application Swaglabs # com.e2etests.automation.step_definitions.AuthenticationStepDefinitions.jeMeConnecteSurLApplicationSwaglabs() When je click sur le menu burger # com.e2etests.automation.step_definitions.LogoutStepDefinitions.jeClickSurLeMenuBurger() And je click sur About # com.e2etests.automation.step_definitions.LogoutStepDefinitions.jeClickSurAbout() Then je me redirige vers la page about # com.e2etests.automation.step_definitions.LogoutStepDefinitions.jeMeRedirigeVersLaPageAbout()
testcase.system-err: Jun 21, 2026 11:45:21 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 149, returning the closest version; found: 147; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 149
